emails.subject: Introduction
emails.body: Mark, Mike, I have scheduled a video conference with this gentleman on Thursday this week at 3:30 p.m. Can you join me for this conversation? Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 06/20/2000 04:16 PM <avi.hauser@effem.com> on 06/20/2000 03:12:53 PM

emails.body: Re: Introduction I would be very happy to participate. Thank you for thinking of us.
